        General Statistics: Columns

        Uncheck the tick box to hide columns. Click and drag the handle on the left to change order. Table ID: general_stats_table_table

        Sort Visible Group Column Description ID Scale
        || QUAST N50 (Kbp) N50 is the contig length such that using longer or equal length contigs produces half (50%) of the bases of the assembly (kilo base pairs) quast-N50
        || QUAST Assembly Length (Mbp) The total number of bases in the assembly (Mbp). quast-Total_length
        || Kraken Klebsiella pneumoniae Percentage of reads that were the top species over all samples (Klebsiella pneumoniae) kraken-pct_top_one
        || Kraken Top 5 species Percentage of reads that were classified by one of the top-5 species (Klebsiella pneumoniae, Klebsiella aerogenes, Escherichia coli, Homo sapiens, Klebsiella quasipneumoniae) kraken-pct_top_n
        || Kraken Unclassified Percentage of reads that were unclassified kraken-pct_unclassified

        QUAST

        Quality assessment tool for genome assemblies.http://quast.bioinf.spbau.ruDOI: 10.1093/bioinformatics/btt086

        Assembly Statistics

        AI Summary
        Provider: , model:
        Chat with Seqera AI

        Showing 1182 samples.

        Created with MultiQC

        QUAST: Assembly Statistics: Columns

        Uncheck the tick box to hide columns. Click and drag the handle on the left to change order. Table ID: quast_table_table

        Sort Visible Group Column Description ID Scale
        || N50 (Kbp) N50 is the contig length such that using longer or equal length contigs produces half (50%) of the bases of the assembly. quast-N50
        || L50 (K) L50 is the number of contigs larger than N50, i.e. the minimum number of contigs comprising 50% of the total assembly length. quast-L50
        || Largest contig (Kbp) The size of the largest contig of the assembly quast-Largest_contig
        || Length (Mbp) The total number of bases in the assembly. quast-Total_length

        Number of Contigs

        This plot shows the number of contigs found for each assembly, broken down by length.

        AI Summary
        Provider: , model:
        Chat with Seqera AI
        Created with MultiQC

        Kraken

        Taxonomic classification using exact k-mer matches to find the lowest common ancestor (LCA) of a given sequence.https://ccb.jhu.edu/software/krakenDOI: 10.1186/gb-2014-15-3-r46

        Top taxa

        The number of reads falling into the top 5 taxa across different ranks.

        To make this plot, the percentage of each sample assigned to a given taxa is summed across all samples. The counts for these top 5 taxa are then plotted for each of the 9 different taxa ranks. The unclassified count is always shown across all taxa ranks.

        The total number of reads is approximated by dividing the number of unclassified reads by the percentage of the library that they account for. Note that this is only an approximation, and that kraken percentages don't always add to exactly 100%.

        The category "Other" shows the difference between the above total read count and the sum of the read counts in the top 5 taxa shown + unclassified. This should cover all taxa not in the top 5, +/- any rounding errors.

        Note that any taxon that does not exactly fit a taxon rank (eg. - or G2) is ignored.

        AI Summary

        Toolbox search strings can behave as regular expressions (regexes). Click a button below to see an example of it in action. Try modifying them yourself in the text box.
